requirement_topic.en: Bhutan Standards and Electricity Approval Route — BSB, BEA, and BPC
requirement_topic.zh: 不丹标准与电力审批路径——BSB、BEA和BPC
requirement_topic.zht: 不丹標準與電力審批路徑——BSB、BEA和BPC

summary.en: Bhutan Standards Bureau (BSB) is Bhutan's national standards body and participates in national standards development and conformity-related functions. Bhutan Electricity Authority (BEA) regulates the electricity sector, including licensing, technical regulation, and tariff or service matters. Bhutan Power Corporation (BPC) is the practical utility interface for most distribution and grid-connection acceptance. As of the dataset date, a single official public mandatory whole-unit certification rule for all imported EV chargers could not be confirmed from official sources. Exporters should therefore verify the product's HS code, importer obligations, BSB standards adoption, BEA requirements, BPC connection conditions, radio or smart-metering features, and project-specific tender specifications before shipment.
summary.zh: 不丹标准局（BSB）是不丹国家标准机构，参与国家标准制定和合格评定相关职能。不丹电力管理局（BEA）监管电力行业，包括许可、技术监管、电价或服务事项。不丹电力公司（BPC）是大多数配电和并网验收的实际公用事业接口。截至本数据集日期，未能从官方来源确认适用于所有进口电动汽车充电桩整机的单一公开强制认证规则。因此，出口商应在出货前核实产品HS编码、进口商义务、BSB标准采纳、BEA要求、BPC接入条件、无线或智能计量功能，以及项目特定招标规范。
summary.zht: 不丹標準局（BSB）是不丹國家標準機構，參與國家標準制定和合格評定相關職能。不丹電力管理局（BEA）監管電力行業，包括許可、技術監管、電價或服務事項。不丹電力公司（BPC）是大多數配電和併網驗收的實際公用事業接口。截至本數據集日期，未能從官方來源確認適用於所有進口電動汽車充電樁整機的單一公開強制認證規則。因此，出口商應在出貨前核驗產品HS編碼、進口商義務、BSB標準採納、BEA要求、BPC接入條件、無線或智能計量功能，以及項目特定招標規範。

standards_or_laws: Bhutan Standards Bureau standards and conformity functions
Bhutan Electricity Authority electricity-sector regulation
Bhutan Power Corporation grid-connection and distribution requirements
Project-specific procurement, installation, metering, and commissioning specifications
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 where adopted or specified

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, China EMC and safety reports, and China CCC where applicable. These documents may support technical review but do not automatically establish BSB standards compliance, BEA acceptance, BPC grid-connection approval, or project-owner acceptance in Bhutan.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023、中国EMC和安全报告，以及适用时的中国CCC准备文件。这些文件可支持技术审查，但不能自动证明符合不丹BSB标准、BEA接受、BPC并网批准或项目业主验收。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023、中國EMC和安全報告，以及適用時的中國CCC準備文件。這些文件可支持技術審查，但不能自動證明符合不丹BSB標準、BEA接受、BPC併網批准或項目業主驗收。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should create a Bhutan market-access file that identifies the importer, HS code, charger type, rated input voltage, connector configuration, radio module, metering features, safety and EMC reports, installation manual, local labelling, BPC site connection, and BEA or project-operator obligations. Because Bhutan's EV market is nascent, project documents may carry more practical weight than a generic product route; do not ship against China-only GB/T assumptions without written confirmation from the importer and project owner.
gap.zh: 出口商应建立不丹市场准入文件，明确进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定输入电压、接口配置、无线模块、计量功能、安全和EMC报告、安装手册、本地标签、BPC现场接入，以及BEA或项目运营方义务。由于不丹电动汽车市场仍处于早期，项目文件可能比通用产品路径更具实际约束力；未取得进口商和项目业主书面确认前，不应按仅适用于中国的GB/T假设出货。
gap.zht: 出口商應建立不丹市場准入文件，明確進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定輸入電壓、接口配置、無線模組、計量功能、安全和EMC報告、安裝手冊、本地標籤、BPC現場接入，以及BEA或項目運營方義務。由於不丹電動汽車市場仍處於早期，項目文件可能比通用產品路徑更具實際約束力；未取得進口商和項目業主書面確認前，不應按僅適用於中國的GB/T假設出貨。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional and project-specific — verify BSB standards applicability, BEA electricity-sector obligations, customs or importer requirements, and BPC project acceptance for the specific EV charger and site
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC and domestic project scope; China GB/T or CCC evidence is not a Bhutan market-access substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim Bhutan market access from China GB/T or CCC evidence alone. Confirm the current BSB, BEA, BPC, importer, customs, and project-owner route for the exact charger model, connector configuration, HS code, and installation site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国GB/T或CCC证据宣称满足不丹市场准入。应针对确切充电桩型号、接口配置、HS编码和安装场址，确认当前BSB、BEA、BPC、进口商、海关和项目业主路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國GB/T或CCC證據宣稱滿足不丹市場准入。應針對確切充電樁型號、接口配置、HS編碼和安裝場址，確認當前BSB、BEA、BPC、進口商、海關和項目業主路徑。

requirement_topic.en: Bhutan EV Market Context — Hydro-Dominant Grid and Early Infrastructure
requirement_topic.zh: 不丹电动汽车市场背景——水电主导电网和早期基础设施
requirement_topic.zht: 不丹電動汽車市場背景——水電主導電網和早期基礎設施

summary.en: Bhutan's electricity system is overwhelmingly hydro-dominant, with more than 99% of domestic generation typically from hydropower and significant electricity trade with India. This creates a strong low-carbon rationale for EV adoption, but the EV charging market remains nascent and site-by-site deployment quality is important. Public, fleet, hotel, tourism, government, and border-route charging projects may specify IEC Type 2 / CCS2 connectors, OCPP-capable network operation, IEC safety and EMC evidence, and BPC connection approval. Mountain roads, cold seasonal conditions, monsoon exposure, voltage variation, and high altitude can all affect enclosure, cable, cooling, and power-module choices.
summary.zh: 不丹电力系统高度依赖水电，国内发电通常超过99%来自水电，并与印度有重要电力贸易。这为电动汽车采用提供了强低碳理由，但电动汽车充电市场仍处于早期，逐站部署质量非常重要。公共、车队、酒店、旅游、政府和边境路线充电项目可能要求IEC Type 2 / CCS2接口、支持OCPP的联网运营、IEC安全和EMC证据，以及BPC接入批准。山地道路、寒冷季节条件、季风暴露、电压波动和高海拔都可能影响外壳、电缆、冷却和功率模块选择。
summary.zht: 不丹電力系統高度依賴水電，國內發電通常超過99%來自水電，並與印度有重要電力貿易。這為電動汽車採用提供了強低碳理由，但電動汽車充電市場仍處於早期，逐站部署質量非常重要。公共、車隊、酒店、旅遊、政府和邊境路線充電項目可能要求IEC Type 2 / CCS2接口、支持OCPP的聯網運營、IEC安全和EMC證據，以及BPC接入批准。山地道路、寒冷季節條件、季風暴露、電壓波動和高海拔都可能影響外殼、電纜、冷卻和功率模組選擇。

standards_or_laws: Bhutan hydropower-dominant electricity system and India interconnection context
BPC project and distribution connection requirements
BEA electricity-sector requirements for operators where applicable
IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 and OCPP requirements where specified by tenders or operators
IEC 61851 and IEC 61000 evidence for project procurement

summary.en: China's domestic EV infrastructure programme is large-scale and GB/T-based, with mature domestic charging networks and charger manufacturing. That scale does not remove Bhutan-specific project constraints. Hardware configured for China connectors, China 220/380 V assumptions, China operator platforms, and China labels must be adapted for Bhutan's IEC direction, 230/400 V grid, English or local project documentation, and BPC site acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车基础设施计划规模庞大并以GB/T体系为基础，国内充电网络和充电桩制造成熟。但这种规模并不能消除不丹特定项目约束。按中国接口、中国220/380 V假设、中国运营平台和中国标签配置的硬件，必须适配不丹IEC方向、230/400 V电网、英文或本地项目文件，以及BPC现场验收。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車基礎設施計劃規模龐大並以GB/T體系為基礎，國內充電網絡和充電樁製造成熟。但這種規模並不能消除不丹特定項目約束。按中國接口、中國220/380 V假設、中國運營平台和中國標籤配置的硬體，必須適配不丹IEC方向、230/400 V電網、英文或本地項目文件，以及BPC現場驗收。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
GB/T 20234 series
China domestic charging-network operator requirements

gap.en: Bhutan's hydro-powered EV opportunity is real, but it is not a conformity shortcut. Chinese exporters should qualify the actual use case: public corridor, fleet depot, hotel, government site, residential AC, or DC fast charging. Each use case may require different connector mix, OCPP profile, weatherproofing, altitude derating, service-spare strategy, and BPC connection documents. Early-market deployments have limited tolerance for incompatible GB/T-only hardware because spare parts, vehicle compatibility, and local service capacity are still developing.
gap.zh: 不丹由水电支撑的电动汽车机会真实存在，但不是合规捷径。中国出口商应明确实际使用场景：公共走廊、车队场站、酒店、政府场址、住宅交流充电或直流快充。每种场景可能需要不同接口组合、OCPP配置、防候设计、海拔降额、服务备件策略和BPC接入文件。早期市场部署对不兼容的纯GB/T硬件容忍度有限，因为备件、车辆兼容性和本地服务能力仍在发展。
gap.zht: 不丹由水電支撐的電動汽車機會真實存在，但不是合規捷徑。中國出口商應明確實際使用場景：公共走廊、車隊場站、酒店、政府場址、住宅交流充電或直流快充。每種場景可能需要不同接口組合、OCPP配置、防候設計、海拔降額、服務備件策略和BPC接入文件。早期市場部署對不兼容的純GB/T硬體容忍度有限，因為備件、車輛兼容性和本地服務能力仍在發展。

mandatory_status.target: Policy and market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; project specifications, BSB / BEA requirements, and BPC grid-connection approval remain independent obligations
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China domestic EV policy and market scale do not affect Bhutan conformity or project acceptance obligations

source.publisher: Department of Energy, Royal Government of Bhutan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bhutan's hydro-dominant grid supports EV deployment, but charger readiness still depends on IEC connectors, IEC safety and EMC files, OCPP or operator integration where required, 230/400 V grid validation, high-altitude derating, and BPC project acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不丹水电主导电网支持电动汽车部署，但充电桩就绪仍取决于IEC接口、IEC安全和EMC文件、需要时的OCPP或运营方集成、230/400 V电网验证、高海拔降额和BPC项目验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不丹水電主導電網支持電動汽車部署，但充電樁就緒仍取決於IEC接口、IEC安全和EMC文件、需要時的OCPP或運營方集成、230/400 V電網驗證、高海拔降額和BPC項目驗收。
